title: Evaluate resilience benefit and remove dead weight
goal: Measure whether the implemented mechanisms reduce stale work, recovery uncertainty and common-mode risk enough to justify their maintenance cost, then remove or simplify fields that do not change decisions.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Before/after evidence covers stale projections, orphan claims, recovery success, closure duration, recurring failures and operational friction.
Each retained field or gate demonstrates at least one real decision it changed or risk it exposed.
Unused, duplicative or false-blocking mechanisms have a reviewed simplification or removal path.
Bureau, Systemkatalog, Chronik and convergence evidence agree on completed scope and explicit residual risks.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
